expectations.text: Script contains a model create command
A rigid body part is created with part create rigid_body
expectations.evidence: Found: 'part create rigid_body name_and_position  part_name = .PENDULUM.LINK' and 'part create rigid_body mass_properties'

expectations.text: At least one marker is created on the link and at least one on ground
A revolute joint is created using constraint create joint revolute with i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: Found: 'constraint create joint revolute  joint_name = .PENDULUM.REV_JOINT  i_marker_name = .PENDULUM.LINK.LINK_PIVOT  j_marker_name = .PENDULUM.ground.GRND_PIVOT'

expectations.text: Gravity is created with force create body gravitational (not force create body_force or any other variant)
expectations.evidence: Found: 'force create body gravitational  gravity_field_name = .PENDULUM.gravity  y_component_gravity = -9806.65'

expectations.text: Initial orientation set to 45 degrees for the release angle
expectations.evidence: Part placed at the initial 45° configuration: 'part create rigid_body name_and_position  part_name = .PENDULUM.LINK  location = 70.711, -70.711, 0.0  orientation = -45.0, 0.0, 0.0'

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully (no abbreviations)
expectations.evidence: Full keyword forms used throughout the script

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: Found multiple explicit adams_id values: 'adams_id = 2' on LINK part, 'adams_id = 1' on GRND_PIVOT marker, 'adams_id = 3' on LINK_PIVOT marker, 'adams_id = 1' on REV_JOINT
